deletion.title: Your account is scheduled for deletion
deletion.bodyLead: You asked to delete your account. All your data is still saved — if you've changed your mind, you can cancel now and go back to using it as usual.
deletion.bodyDeadline: Otherwise, on <0>{{date}}</0> everything will be permanently deleted, with no way to recover it or sign in again.
deletion.cancel: Cancel deletion and restore my account
